title: Fig. 1. A in Molecular-based laboratory testing confer accuracy over microscopical testing for tick identification
author: Singh, Isaac
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. A phylogenetic tree was constructed for cluster analysis of BC ticks based on the mitochondrial DNA gene cytochrome C oxidase subunit I sequence using Geneious software. The BC ticks (in bold) identified through real-time PCR, specifically Ixodes scapularis and Ixodes pacificus, clustered with the corresponding NCBI reference strains into two distinct groups. These groups were clearly separated from the outgroups Ixodes ricinus and Ixodes persulcatus. This result provides strong sequencing evidence supporting the accurate identification of ticks in this study.
